hook.text: AMAD DIALLO IN WORLD CUP ACTION TONIGHT

beats.text: IVORY COAST FACE ECUADOR AT MIDNIGHT BST
AMAD STRUCK LATE TO BEAT FRANCE IN A WARM-UP
HE STARRED AT THE 2025 AFCON WITH THREE GOALS

caption: United's own Amad Diallo kicks off his World Cup tonight 🔴⚽ Ivory Coast vs Ecuador, midnight BST — he already proved his quality by scoring the late winner against France in a warm-up, and starred at the 2025 AFCON with 3 goals. The Elephants could go deep, and Amad is their X-factor. Who's watching? 🔴 #mufc #manutd #football #matchday #worldcup2026 #fifaworldcup2026 #amad #ivorycoast
